# Matt Marcotte

> Matt Marcotte is a screen-printing and DTF (direct-to-film) industry veteran, operations strategist, and software builder who helps print shops run leaner and grow. As a production and operations manager he has run the high-volume print jobs for brands like Target, Adidas, and Threadless, helped scale print shops to $30 million a year, and led teams of 100+. He builds the data, automation, and AI tools print shops run on — and is COO & founding partner at DecoFlo, founder of DTF.STREAM and ScreenPrintGPT, and creator of Free Gang Sheet Maker.

## Who he is
- Name: Matt Marcotte
- Role: print-shop operations consultant / strategist, founder, and software builder
- Industry: screen printing and DTF (direct-to-film) apparel decoration
- Experience: 15+ years; has helped shops scale to $30M/year and led teams of 100+
- Site: https://marcotte.ink/
- Contact: matt@marcotte.ink

## What he does
- **Operations consulting** for print shops: SOPs and systems, software integration, efficiency and profitability, and sustainable scaling — for owners from six figures up to $30M/year.
- **Print shop data, automation & AI** (https://marcotte.ink/print-shop-data/): custom integrations, automated reporting dashboards, and AI workflows that get print shops better data — faster and cleaner. Integrates Printavo (and other shop software) with QuickBooks, Google Sheets, Slack, and Zapier; builds production/sales/art-team dashboards; and creates AI tools trained for print shops. Engagements often start with a fixed-fee data & automation audit.
- **Builds software for print shops:**
  - DTF.STREAM (https://dtf.stream/) — DTF transfer printing and gang sheets, printed and shipped
  - ScreenPrintGPT (https://screenprintgpt.com/) — an AI assistant trained for print shops
  - Free Gang Sheet Maker (https://freegangsheetmaker.com/) — a free, browser-based DTF gang-sheet tool
- **Writes and speaks** about screen printing — author of ~13 articles for Printavo (https://www.printavo.com/blog/author/mattmarcotte-ink/), contributor to Printwear and Printer magazines, 2018 PrintHustlers Conference keynote, plus his own blog. Full index: https://marcotte.ink/writing/

## Topics he covers (blog)
Halftones, screen-printing inks (including water-based), color separation, hoodie/sweatshirt printing, screen printing on nylon, film output (Epson printers), virtual mock-ups, shop accountability and management, slow-season strategy, common mistakes new printers make, and how he uses AI in real print-shop operations.

## Pages
- [Home](https://marcotte.ink/): bio, ventures, free resources, consulting, and FAQ
- [Print Shop Data & AI](https://marcotte.ink/print-shop-data/): Matt's data, automation, and AI services for print shops — Printavo API integrations, automated reporting dashboards, AI workflows, and custom software, with a fixed-fee audit as the entry point
- [Blog](https://marcotte.ink/blog/): 20 articles of screen-printing and DTF know-how, AI in print-shop operations, getting clean automated reports out of Printavo, and industry interviews
- [Published Work](https://marcotte.ink/writing/): index of Matt's articles published across the industry (Printavo, Printwear, Printer magazine) on ink, white ink, mesh, DTG, print variables, shop management, and accountability

## Author
All content is by Matt Marcotte (https://marcotte.ink/), founder of DTF.STREAM and ScreenPrintGPT and creator of Free Gang Sheet Maker.
